chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-496 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of main case 14-09-2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G a/w Syed Wafa Hassan Shah, Law Officer/ Regional Director Colleges, Sukkur on behalf of Secretary College Education Department, Government of Sindh. ***** Petitioners were low-paid employees in the College Education Department and were terminated in the year 2016 on the ground that their appointments were in excess of sanctioned posts. Against which, they filed departmental appeal which is pending before the Secretary College Education Department, Government of Sindh. Learned counsel, at the very outset, submits that he would be satisfied and will not press this petition if the Secretary College Education Department is directed to decide the appeal within a reasonable time. Leaned Assistant A.G has not opposed this proposal. Accordingly this petition is disposed of as not pressed. However, the Secretary College Education Department, Government of Sindh shall decide the departmental appeal, if any, filed by the petitioners in accordance with law within a period of one month. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
